creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #2)
meson-python is only meant to be used with meson, which not only are part of the same project umbrella, but neither have a "py-" prefix in their respective port directory names yet both are flavoured. In this specific case, having the prefix in one or both directory names is more confusing as meson itself is implemented in Python. The resulting PORTNAME/package name does, however, include distribution-specific prefixes.
